title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 04 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 04 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 04 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 04/05/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 2.31% today, the main contract closed at 698.5.The traders' willingness to ship is general.The steel mills are not acƟve to purchase.The overall trading senƟment of the market is less.PBF at Shandong port deal 800-808 yuan/mt, PBF at Tangshan port deal 810 yuan/mt. On the supply side, the total global iron ore shipment volume of SMM last week was 28.56 million tons, a decrease of 0.3% month on month. Among them, the shipment volume from Australia decreased slightly, while the shipment volume from Brazil increased significantly; The total amount of iron ore delivered to port by SMM China was 22.1775 million tons, a decrease of 15.59% compared to the previous month.
